_meta.description: Human-readable explanations for FORGE gate_reason codes. Used by Athena UI (GET /api/gate_legend) and docs/ATHENA_UI_DESIGN.md. Add new codes here when FORGE introduces new gates.

entry_quality_direction.label: Direction — not enough aligned bars
entry_quality_direction.explanation: Too few M5 candles are moving in the trade direction. FORGE requires at least 2 consecutive bars confirming the direction before entry.

entry_quality_body.label: Candle body too small
entry_quality_body.explanation: The entry candle's body (open-to-close) is too small relative to its full range (high-to-low). A tiny body means indecision — not a clean directional move.

entry_quality_rsi_buy_ceil.label: RSI too high for a buy
entry_quality_rsi_buy_ceil.explanation: RSI is above the buy ceiling (default 70). Buying when RSI is overbought risks entering at the top of a move. FORGE blocks buys in exhausted territory.

entry_quality_rsi_sell_floor.label: RSI too low for a sell
entry_quality_rsi_sell_floor.explanation: RSI is below the sell floor (default 30). Selling when RSI is deeply oversold risks entering into exhaustion (Cardwell reversal zone). FORGE blocks sells here.

entry_quality_adx_min_sell.label: ADX too low for a breakout sell
entry_quality_adx_min_sell.explanation: The Average Directional Index (ADX) measures trend strength. It is below the minimum required for a sell breakout (default 20). Not enough momentum to justify the trade.

entry_quality_adx_min_buy.label: ADX too low for a breakout buy
entry_quality_adx_min_buy.explanation: ADX is below the minimum required for a buy breakout. Not enough trending momentum — the market is too range-bound for a breakout entry.

entry_quality_atr.label: ATR (volatility) too low
entry_quality_atr.explanation: Average True Range (ATR) measures recent volatility. It is below the minimum threshold. Low ATR means the market is too quiet for a valid entry — spreads eat too much of the potential move.

entry_quality_bb_contraction.label: Bollinger Bands contracting
entry_quality_bb_contraction.explanation: The Bollinger Bands are squeezing inward (range narrowing). A breakout setup requires expanding bands. Contracting bands mean no momentum is building.

entry_quality_bb_expansion.label: Bollinger Bands not expanding enough
entry_quality_bb_expansion.explanation: BB width has not expanded sufficiently from its recent low. Required for breakout confirmation — expansion signals increasing volatility and directional move.

entry_quality_m30_not_bearish.label: M30 chart not confirming bearish bias
entry_quality_m30_not_bearish.explanation: The 30-minute timeframe is not showing a bearish structure (lower highs, lower lows, or bearish EMA cross). FORGE requires the M30 to agree with the M5 sell signal.

entry_quality_macd_q0.label: MACD quadrant mismatch (Q0 — neutral rising)
entry_quality_macd_q0.explanation: The MACD histogram is in Quadrant 0: positive and rising. Required for buy entries on some setups. For sells, this quadrant blocks entry because momentum is bullish.

entry_quality_macd_q1.label: MACD quadrant mismatch (Q1 — neutral falling)
entry_quality_macd_q1.explanation: MACD histogram is in Quadrant 1: positive but falling. Required for sell entries — confirms losing momentum on the upside. Blocks buy entries.

entry_quality_macd_q2.label: MACD quadrant mismatch (Q2 — bearish falling)
entry_quality_macd_q2.explanation: MACD histogram is in Quadrant 2: negative and falling. Required for strong sell entries. Blocks buy entries — price momentum is clearly bearish.

entry_quality_macd_q3.label: MACD quadrant mismatch (Q3 — bearish rising)
entry_quality_macd_q3.explanation: MACD histogram is in Quadrant 3: negative but rising (recovering). Blocks both aggressive sells and buys — market is transitioning, not yet directional.

entry_quality_h4_rsi_sell_blocked.label: H4 RSI gate blocked sell
entry_quality_h4_rsi_sell_blocked.explanation: The 4-hour RSI is too low (already oversold on H4). Selling here would be piling into an exhausted move on a higher timeframe — risky reversal territory.

entry_quality_h4_rsi_buy_blocked.label: H4 RSI gate blocked buy
entry_quality_h4_rsi_buy_blocked.explanation: The 4-hour RSI is too high (already overbought on H4). Buying here would be chasing an extended move on the higher timeframe.

entry_quality_h4_adx_sell_blocked.label: H4 ADX gate blocked sell
entry_quality_h4_adx_sell_blocked.explanation: The 4-hour ADX is below the minimum for a sell. No strong trend is confirmed on the higher timeframe to support the M5 sell signal.

entry_quality_session_sell_cutoff.label: Sell cutoff time reached
entry_quality_session_sell_cutoff.explanation: Sell entries are blocked after a configurable UTC hour (default 17:00 NY, 00:00 London). Avoids holding short positions through thin overnight markets.

open_groups.label: Maximum open positions reached
open_groups.explanation: FORGE has reached its limit on how many trade groups can be open at the same time (default 2). No new entries until an existing group closes.

max_open_same_direction.label: Too many open positions in same direction
max_open_same_direction.explanation: Already at the maximum number of concurrent SELL (or BUY) groups. Prevents over-exposure in one direction even if total group count allows more.

no_setup.label: No valid pattern detected
no_setup.explanation: Neither the BB Breakout nor the BB Bounce conditions were met on this bar. The market did not reach a Bollinger Band or show a qualifying breakout move.

session_off.label: Outside trading session window
session_off.explanation: The current bar falls outside the allowed trading sessions (London and/or New York). Asian session is typically excluded to avoid thin liquidity.

spread_too_wide.label: Spread exceeds maximum
spread_too_wide.explanation: The bid-ask spread is wider than the configured maximum (default 30 points for XAUUSD). Wide spreads make entries uneconomical — cost too high relative to target profit.

min_rr.label: Risk:Reward ratio too low
min_rr.explanation: The distance from entry to TP1 is not large enough relative to the stop-loss distance. FORGE requires a minimum R:R (default 1.5×) before placing a trade.

min_entry_atr.label: ATR too small at entry
min_entry_atr.explanation: The Average True Range at this specific entry bar is below the minimum. Complements the general ATR gate — checks the ATR at the moment of the signal, not just recent average.

high_vol_trend_guard.label: High-volatility trend guard active
high_vol_trend_guard.explanation: ADX is very high AND the H1/H4 trend is not fully aligned. In explosive trending conditions, FORGE requires both timeframes to agree before entering — avoids getting caught in a spike reversal.

adx_hysteresis.label: ADX hysteresis — cooling down from high trend
adx_hysteresis.explanation: ADX recently exceeded the 'enter trend' threshold and has not yet dropped below the 'exit trend' threshold. FORGE waits for ADX to cool before accepting new signals — prevents chasing a decelerating trend.

sell_loss_grace.label: Post-loss cooldown (sell side)
sell_loss_grace.explanation: A sell trade recently hit its stop-loss. FORGE waits a configurable cooldown period (default 90 seconds) before allowing new sells. Prevents immediately re-entering a losing direction.

loss_cooldown.label: Post-loss cooldown (any direction)
loss_cooldown.explanation: Any trade recently hit its stop-loss. A brief cooldown period is enforced before any new entry. Prevents revenge-trading after a loss.

direction_cooldown.label: Same-direction cooldown
direction_cooldown.explanation: A trade in the same direction was recently opened. A short bar-count cooldown is enforced to avoid stacking entries too quickly in one direction.

warmup_tester_m5_rollovers.label: Tester warmup — indicators not ready
warmup_tester_m5_rollovers.explanation: At the very start of a backtest, the M5 indicator buffers (RSI, Bollinger Bands, ATR etc.) do not have enough bars of history. These signals are discarded as they would be based on incomplete data.

news_filter_blocked.label: News event blackout window
news_filter_blocked.explanation: A high-impact economic news event is imminent or just released. FORGE blocks new entries within configured windows before/after events (e.g. NFP: 30 min before, 60 min after).

news_filter_tighten.label: News event — tightened entry criteria
news_filter_tighten.explanation: Near a medium-impact news event. FORGE doesn't fully block entries but requires stricter RSI conditions. The signal failed the tightened criteria.

dd_equity_close_all.label: Drawdown breaker — equity too low
dd_equity_close_all.explanation: Account equity has dropped below the drawdown protection threshold (default 3% from session high). FORGE suspends new entries until equity recovers.
